global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with engaging text and interactive elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to explore new content with a free trial.

elements.label: Green abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant green background with abstract shapes and patterns, creating a lively atmosphere.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: The logo features bold, modern typography with the word 'BingeLayer' prominently displayed.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: Text in a bold font stating 'Exclusive tonight' with a smaller line underneath saying 'New hits every week'.

elements.label: Small circular shapes
elements.description: A few small circular shapes scattered across the background, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Play button icon
elements.description: A simple white play button icon, indicating interactivity.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Try for free' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Additional circular shapes
elements.description: More small circular shapes that complement the overall design.

elements.label: Unidentified shape
elements.description: A square shape that appears to be part of the background design.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'BingeLayer UGC' is displayed in large, bold text at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Additional offer text
elements.description: Text that elaborates on the offer, presented in a clear and engaging font.
elements.text_content: Exclusive tonight New hits every week

elements.label: Secondary call to action
elements.description: A smaller call to action at the bottom encouraging users to try the service for free.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and playful, BingeLayer logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by the body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: BingeLayer UGC, Exclusive tonight, New hits every week, Try for free
